channel.title: GitHub Smalltalk Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Smalltalk in GitHub

item.title: feenkcom/gt4aws
item.description: Utilities to connect to AWS services from Glamorous Toolkit

item.title: feenkcom/JavaScriptGenerator
item.description: A toolkit to generate JavaScript source code from Pharo.

item.title: svenvc/ztimestamp
item.description: I am ZTimestamp, a Magnitude, a point in time, an alternative to DateAndTime and TimeStamp

item.title: kursjan/petitparser2
item.description: A high-performance top-down parser

item.title: pharo-contributions/BitmapCharacterSet
item.description: BitmapCharacterSet is a set for characters that uses a bitmap for storing wide characters and an array of truth values for byte characters. Used by XMLParser.

item.title: pharo-contributions/OrderPreservingDictionary
item.description: a little preserving dictionary

item.title: feenkcom/gt4git
item.description: The interface to work with Git projects from within Glamorous Toolkit.

item.title: feenkcom/bloc-pac
item.description: Bloc Pac is a suite of libraries and components to help developers create UI with Bloc

item.title: feenkcom/gt4phlow-rs
item.description: Integration of phlow-rs with Glamorous Toolkit and ability to render views in GT Inspector

item.title: feenkcom/sparta
item.description: Sparta is a canvas on top of Skia.

item.title: feenkcom/xdoc
item.description: The executable document engine.

item.title: feenkcom/famix3
item.description: This is a port of the FAMIX 3 meta-model and of the depending projects.

item.title: feenkcom/pharo-futures
item.description: Abstractions for asynchronous programming in Pharo

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-phlow
item.description: The GT engine for scripting reactive browsers

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-coder
item.description: The GT set of tools for writing Pharo code.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-spotter
item.description: The moldable search tool.

item.title: feenkcom/pharo-telemetry
item.description: Performance telemetry collection infrastructure based on Beacon

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-utility
item.description: Pharo integrations

item.title: feenkcom/gt4openapi
item.description: Glamorous OpenAPI Toolkit

item.title: feenkcom/gt4xmlsupport
item.description: Glamorous Toolkit for XMLSupport

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-gleam
item.description: C wrapper around OpenGL bindings for Servo

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-vm-bindings
item.description: Image side code to communicate with the Glamorous Toolkit VM

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-pager
item.description: The tool that spawns other tools (inspector, playground, debugger, ...) into pages

item.title: j-brant/RBFormatter
item.description: the RBConfigurableFormatter from the Refactoring Browser
